13 drug_benefit_type Drug Benefit Type Char 1 Indicates the type of Part D benefit structure used by the plan benefit package (Defined Standard, Actuarially Equivalent, Basic Alternative, or Enhanced Alternative). 1 Defined Standard Benefit

3 Basic Alternative
